title: lithocarpus javensis
intro: Lithocarpus javensis, also known as the Java lithocarpus or Java tanbark oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lithocarpus javensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Lithocarpus javensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its bark is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
